lines.english: Lesson 12
lines.chinese: 第12课
lines.raw: Lesson 12 | 第12课

lines.english: Life on a desert island
lines.chinese: 荒岛生活
lines.raw: Life on a desert island | 荒岛生活

lines.english: What was exceptional about the two men's stay on the desert island?
lines.chinese: 那两个人留在荒岛上有什么特别之处？
lines.raw: What was exceptional about the two men's stay on the desert island? | 那两个人留在荒岛上有什么特别之处？

lines.english: Most of us have formed an unrealistic picture of life on a desert island.
lines.chinese: 我们大多数人对荒岛生活形成了一种不切实际的想象。
lines.raw: Most of us have formed an unrealistic picture of life on a desert island. | 我们大多数人对荒岛生活形成了一种不切实际的想象。

lines.english: We sometimes imagine a desert island to be a sort of paradise where the sun always shines.
lines.chinese: 我们有时把荒岛想象成一个阳光普照的天堂。
lines.raw: We sometimes imagine a desert island to be a sort of paradise where the sun always shines. | 我们有时把荒岛想象成一个阳光普照的天堂。

lines.english: Life there is simple and good.
lines.chinese: 那里的生活简单而美好。
lines.raw: Life there is simple and good. | 那里的生活简单而美好。

lines.english: Ripe fruit falls from the trees and you never have to work.
lines.chinese: 成熟的果实从树上掉下来，你根本不用劳动。
lines.raw: Ripe fruit falls from the trees and you never have to work. | 成熟的果实从树上掉下来，你根本不用劳动。

lines.english: The other side of the picture is quite the opposite.
lines.chinese: 而另一方面的情况却恰恰相反。
lines.raw: The other side of the picture is quite the opposite. | 而另一方面的情况却恰恰相反。

lines.english: Life on a desert island is wretched.
lines.chinese: 荒岛上的生活是悲惨的。
lines.raw: Life on a desert island is wretched. | 荒岛上的生活是悲惨的。

lines.english: You either starve to death or live like Robinson Crusoe, waiting for a boat which never comes.
lines.chinese: 你不是饿死，就是像鲁滨逊漂流记一样，苦等一艘永不来临的船。
lines.raw: You either starve to death or live like Robinson Crusoe, waiting for a boat which never comes. | 你不是饿死，就是像鲁滨逊漂流记一样，苦等一艘永不来临的船。

lines.english: Perhaps there is an element of truth in both these pictures, but few of us have had the opportunity to find out.
lines.chinese: 也许这两种景象都有点真实性，但我们很少有人有机会去证实。
lines.raw: Perhaps there is an element of truth in both these pictures, but few of us have had the opportunity to find out. | 也许这两种景象都有点真实性，但我们很少有人有机会去证实。

lines.english: Two men who recently spent five days on a coral island wished they had stayed there longer.
lines.chinese: 最近，有两个人在一个珊瑚岛上待了五天，他们真希望能在那里待得更久。
lines.raw: Two men who recently spent five days on a coral island wished they had stayed there longer. | 最近，有两个人在一个珊瑚岛上待了五天，他们真希望能在那里待得更久。

lines.english: They were taking a badly damaged boat from the Virgin Islands to Miami to have it repaired.
lines.chinese: 他们正驾驶一艘严重受损的船从维尔京群岛前往迈阿密修理。
lines.raw: They were taking a badly damaged boat from the Virgin Islands to Miami to have it repaired. | 他们正驾驶一艘严重受损的船从维尔京群岛前往迈阿密修理。

lines.english: During the journey, their boat began to sink.
lines.chinese: 旅途中，他们的船开始下沉。
lines.raw: During the journey, their boat began to sink. | 旅途中，他们的船开始下沉。

lines.english: They quickly loaded a small rubber dinghy with food, matches, and cans of beer and rowed for a few miles across the Caribbean until they arrived at a tiny coral island.
lines.chinese: 他们迅速将食物、火柴和几罐啤酒装上一艘小橡皮艇，划行了几英里穿过加勒比海，直到抵达一个微小的珊瑚岛。
lines.raw: They quickly loaded a small rubber dinghy with food, matches, and cans of beer and rowed for a few miles across the Caribbean until they arrived at a tiny coral island. | 他们迅速将食物、火柴和几罐啤酒装上一艘小橡皮艇，划行了几英里穿过加勒比海，直到抵达一个微小的珊瑚岛。

lines.english: There were hardly any trees on the island and there was no water, but this did not prove to be a problem.
lines.chinese: 岛上几乎没有树木，也没有水，但这并没有成为一个问题。
lines.raw: There were hardly any trees on the island and there was no water, but this did not prove to be a problem. | 岛上几乎没有树木，也没有水，但这并没有成为一个问题。

lines.english: The men collected rainwater in the rubber dinghy.
lines.chinese: 两人用橡皮艇收集雨水。
lines.raw: The men collected rainwater in the rubber dinghy. | 两人用橡皮艇收集雨水。

lines.english: As they had brought a spear gun with them, they had plenty to eat.
lines.chinese: 由于他们带了一支鱼枪，所以食物很充足。
lines.raw: As they had brought a spear gun with them, they had plenty to eat. | 由于他们带了一支鱼枪，所以食物很充足。

lines.english: They caught lobster and fish every day, and as one of them put it 'ate like kings'.
lines.chinese: 他们每天都捕捞龙虾和鱼，正如其中一人所说，他们“吃得像国王一样”。
lines.raw: They caught lobster and fish every day, and as one of them put it 'ate like kings'. | 他们每天都捕捞龙虾和鱼，正如其中一人所说，他们“吃得像国王一样”。

lines.english: When a passing tanker rescued them five days later, both men were genuinely sorry that they had to leave.
lines.chinese: 五天后，当一艘过往的油轮救起他们时，两人都真诚地感到遗憾，因为他们不得不离开。
lines.raw: When a passing tanker rescued them five days later, both men were genuinely sorry that they had to leave. | 五天后，当一艘过往的油轮救起他们时，两人都真诚地感到遗憾，因为他们不得不离开。
